use_codes.desc: METHOD OF DECREASING THE PRODUCTION OF A-BETA USING A COMPOSITION WHICH DECREASES BLOOD CHOLESTEROL IN PATIENTS AT RISK OF OR EXHIBITING SYMPTOMS OF ALZHEIMER'S DISEASE
